prompts.name: Clean Quality
prompts.text: Use clean high-quality rendering with readable forms, clear subject focus, balanced detail, and coherent style.

prompts.name: Detailed Quality
prompts.text: Add meaningful detail to the subject, outfit, materials, and environment without creating clutter or visual noise.

prompts.name: Soft Quality
prompts.text: Use soft appealing rendering with gentle gradients, smooth light transitions, and polished visual comfort.

prompts.name: Sharp Quality
prompts.text: Keep important details sharp, especially eyes, face, hair, hands, clothing edges, and key props.

prompts.name: Balanced Quality
prompts.text: Balance realism, stylization, lighting, color, detail, and composition so the image feels cohesive.

prompts.name: Premium Quality
prompts.text: Create a polished premium image with refined color, clean lighting, strong composition, and attractive finishing detail.

prompts.name: Natural Quality
prompts.text: Use natural colors, believable light, grounded materials, and restrained post-processing.

prompts.name: Cinematic Quality
prompts.text: Use cinematic composition, cohesive color, meaningful lighting, and visual storytelling without forcing the scene too dark.

prompts.name: Anime-Friendly Quality
prompts.text: Support anime-style images with expressive face, clean shapes, readable outfit, appealing color, and polished character design.

prompts.name: Realism-Friendly Quality
prompts.text: Support realistic images with natural skin, believable materials, proper exposure, and physically plausible lighting.

prompts.name: Print-Ready Quality
prompts.text: Use strong clarity, clean edges, controlled noise, and consistent finish suitable for high-quality output.

prompts.name: Social-Ready Quality
prompts.text: Create a clear attractive image with strong subject readability, eye-catching color, and clean composition.

prompts.name: Gallery Quality
prompts.text: Create a visually memorable image with refined detail, strong mood, balanced composition, and finished presentation.

prompts.name: PromptChain Default Quality
prompts.text: Apply a safe default quality boost with clear subject, readable background, balanced lighting, clean anatomy, and polished detail.

prompts.name: Final Polish Quality
prompts.text: Apply final polish to lighting, color, detail, composition, materials, and subject clarity.
